LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationIncident.label: preference deprivation
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceDeprivationIncident.letter: {PAWN_labelShort} has gone too long without eating {PAWN_possessive} preferred type of food. This will slow {PAWN_objective} down while eating until {PAWN_pronoun} gets a preferred meal. The frustration may also cause a short outburst, such as hiding away or wandering outside.
